description: roundel impressed by lentoid + Hieroglyphic cushion seals; face: S-spiral + Hieroglyphic A-SA
notes: Linear A content doubtful (impressions Hieroglyphic; face motif a spiral) - listed by Younger, flagged here for completeness only.

description: page tablet fragment, Museum of Prehistoric Thera 8366, LM IA; ]10[ / ]TELA+SE ]200[
publication: Boulotis, 'Les nouveaux documents en lineaire A d'Akrotiri (Thera): remarques preliminaires', BCH 122 (1998) 407-411
notes: Division into 'tablet 5/tablet 6' is Younger's own (all under museum inv. 8366); inventory has THEtab.4/THEtab.5 from the same find but not 6. BCH 122 is on Persee (OA).

description: pithos from the House of the Ladies, 4 signs (reading incl. VIN+TE 120)
publication: unpublished: Bennett & Owens (n.d.); Karnava, 'Horizons' conference paper forthcoming (per Younger, 2023 state)
notes: Younger prints a provisional reading; primary edition pending - check whether Karnava's paper has appeared since Aug 2023.

description: nodule HM 32/1, single sign *301 + seal impression CMS II 7 no. 23
publication: Hallager 1995, Proceedings of the Danish Institute at Athens 1, 12, fig. 9
notes: Siblings ZA Wa 36 / ZA Wb 37 (Weingarten 1983) are in inventory.

publication: unpublished; listed in Del Freo & Zurbach 2011 p. 93
notes: Younger: '(unpublished)'.
